status: Steam is ready for API secrets. Add STEAM_API_KEY to publish owned games, achievements, and 100% games.

stats.label: Live Steam API
stats.note: Add STEAM_API_KEY as a GitHub secret.

completedGames.title: 100% games pending
completedGames.note: This fills from achievement data when the Steam API refresh succeeds.

storeHighlights.title: Steam Store feed pending
storeHighlights.note: The deployment workflow fills this with sales, popular games, new releases, and coming soon titles.

preorderWatch.title: Pre-order feed pending
preorderWatch.note: Shows one upcoming/pre-order game at a time, with top seller fallback when Steam has no upcoming entries.
